tool_args.label: 34th Street Select Bus Service has_metric NYCT local stop spacing guidelines

payload.description: NYCT citywide local stop spacing guidelines cited in 34th Street SBS proposed design comments

evidence_refs.source_quote: NYCT citywide local stop spacing guidelines, which call for 750-1,000 feet between stops

payload.description: Block length measurement on the 34th Street corridor used in SBS stop spacing analysis

evidence_refs.source_quote: most blocks on the corridor are about 875 feet long

tool_args.label: 34th Street Select Bus Service has_metric Parking/loading space loss if Lexington/Madison stops added

payload.description: Estimated parking/loading space loss if Lexington and Madison Avenue stops are added to the 34th Street SBS

evidence_refs.source_quote: adding back the Lexington Avenue and Madison Avenue stops would result in a loss of about 15-20 parking or loading spaces between Fifth Avenue and Third Avenue

payload.description: Curb regulation change length on Third Avenue as part of 34th Street SBS design

evidence_refs.source_quote: DOT proposes changing the first 100 feet of curb north of corner to No Parking

tool_args.label: 34th Street Select Bus Service has_metric Increase in legal midday loading spaces

payload.description: Increase in legal midday loading spaces under the 34th Street Select Bus Service project

evidence_refs.source_quote: The proposed 34 th Street Select Bus Service project would increase the amount of legal midday loading on the corridor from about 50 spaces to about 350 spaces.

tool_args.label: 34th Street Select Bus Service has_metric Additional loading space from right turn bay shortening

payload.description: Additional loading space gained by shortening right turn bay on 34th Street between Park and Lexington

evidence_refs.source_quote: DOT can shorten the right turn bay on the north curb of 34 th Street between Park Avenue and Lexington Avenue, providing an additional 30 feet of loading space on this block

tool_args.label: 34th Street Select Bus Service has_metric Stop spacing if Lexington/Madison stops included

payload.description: Stop spacing consequence if Lexington and Madison Avenue stops were included in the 34th Street SBS

evidence_refs.source_quote: Including stops at Madison Avenue and Lexington Avenue would result in stop spacing of less than 250 feet in some cases.

payload.description: ADA compliance statement for the 34th Street SBS project

evidence_refs.source_quote: the project will be fully compliant with the Americans with Disabilities Act (ADA)

tool_args.label: 34th Street Select Bus Service has_claim Traffic accommodation claim

payload.description: DOT confidence claim that the 34th Street SBS plan will accommodate traffic demand

evidence_refs.source_quote: DOT is confident that the proposed plan, which maintains traffic in both directions from river to river, will accommodate traffic demand on 34 th Street without spillover effects onto parallel side streets.

tool_args.label: 34th Street Select Bus Service has_claim Current curbside bus lane benefits claim

payload.description: Claim about benefits of the curbside bus lane configuration on 34th Street

evidence_refs.source_quote: The current curbside bus lane configuration on 34 th Street provides significant benefits to bus riders, including decreased travel times, and has lead to growth in bus ridership on 34 th Street.

tool_args.label: 34th Street Select Bus Service has_claim Private vehicles bus lane access rule

payload.description: Rule permitting private vehicles to use the bus lane for right turns and curb access on 34th Street

evidence_refs.source_quote: private vehicles will be permitted to use the bus lane when making the next available right turn and to access the curb

tool_args.label: 34th Street Select Bus Service has_claim M16/M34 to M15 SBS transfer policy

payload.description: Transfer policy for riders transferring from 34th Street SBS routes to M15 SBS

evidence_refs.source_quote: Riders making a transfer to the M15 SBS will have to obtain a separate receipt at a M15 SBS MetroCard fare collection machine or coin fare collection machine. Existing transfer policies, including free bus to bus transfer, will apply.

tool_args.label: 34th Street Select Bus Service has_claim Loading prioritized over parking

payload.description: Curb regulations for the 34th Street SBS project will prioritize loading over parking

evidence_refs.source_quote: DOT agrees. The curb regulations, which will be determined in consultation with the 34 th Street Community Advisory Committee, residents and other project stakeholders, will prioritize loading over parking.
